In section 35f sub-section (3) shall be ondt^ed. »«*»2 • • • -- 2 of 15 -- i 0 - 3 - A K K B X U R E THE HIFACHAL PBkDESH KHADI AND VILLAGE INDUSTRIES S&-.RD i-CT 1966 (HIMCHAL PRADESH ACT NC. 8 OF 1 9 6 6 ) A3 EXTENDED TO THE UKIOIJ TERRITORY OF DELHI. m ACT To p r o v i d e f o r t h e e s t a b l i s h m e n t o f a Board f o r t h e development o f Khadi and V i l l a g e i n d u s t r i e s i n t h e a r e a s as comprised i n Himachal Pradesh immediately before 1 s t November, 1966 and f o r m a t t e r s connected t h e r e w i t h . BB i t e n a c t e d by t h e L e g i s l a t i v e Assembly o f H i u a c h a l P r a d e s h i n t h e S e v e n t e e n t h Year o f t h e Republic o f I n d i a s follows t - CHAPTFR I PRELIMINARY 1 . S h o r t t i t l e , e x t e n t and commencement . - ( 1 ) This Act may b e c a l l e d t h e Himachal P r a d e s h Khadi and V i l l a g e I n d u s t r i e s Board A c t , 1966. ( 2 ) I t extends t o t h e Whole o f t h e Union territory o f D e l h i . ( 3 ) I t s h a l l come i n t o force on such date a s t h e A d m i n i s t r a t o r may, by n o t i f i c a t i o n i n t h e Delhi G a z e t t e , a p p o i n t i n t h i s b e h a l f , 2 . D e f i n i t i o n s . - I n t h i s Act, u n l e s s t h e c o n t e x t o t h e r w i s e r e q u i r e d , ( a ) " A d m i n i s t r a t o r " means t h e A d m i n i s t r a t o r o f t h e Union t e r r i t o r y o'f Delhi appointed by t h e P r e s i d e n t -ander a r t i r ^ s 239 o f t h e C o n s t i t u t i o n ; ( b ) "Board" means t h e D e l h i Khadi and Village I n d u s t r i e s Board e s t a b l i s h e d under s e c t i o n 3 ; ( c ) "Chairman" means t h e chairman o f t h e Board; ( d ) "Commission" means t h e Khadi and V i l l a g e I n d u s t r i e s Commission e s t a b l i s h e d tinder s e c t i o n A of t h e Khadi and V i l l a g e I n d u s t r i e s Commission A c t , 1956 (61 o f 1956) ( e ) "Khadi" means any c l o t h woven on handleoms i n I n d i a from c o t t o n , s i l k o r wooden y a m , hand-spun i n I n d i a ' o r from a m i x t u r e o f any two o r a l l o f such y a r n ; ( f ) "member" moans a member o f t h e Board; ( g ) " p r e s c r i b e d " means p r e s c r i b e d by r u l e s made under -- 3 of 15 -- i h ) " r e g u l a t i o n s " Beans r e g u l a t i o n s made by t h e Board w i d e r t h i s A c t ; C i ) HViee-Ghairman'! means t h e v i c e - c h a i r m a n of t h e Board; ( j J " v i l l a g e i n d u s t r i e s 8 means - ( i ) a l l o r any of t h e ind-ost r i e s s p e c i f i e d i n t h e Schedule t o t h e Khadi and V i l l a g e I n d u s t r i e s Commission Act, IV56 (61 of 1956/', and i n c l u d e s any o t h e r i n d u s t r y deemed t o b e s p e c i f i e d i n t h e s a i d Schedule by v i r t u e of s e c t i o n 3 o f t h e s a i d Act; and ( i i ) any o t h e r i n d u s t r y n o t i f i e d as a v i l l a g e i n d u s t r y by t h e A d m i n i s t r a t o r a f t e r c o n s u l t a t i o n with t h e Commission and t h e Board, C H A P T E E I I THE DELHI KHADI AND VILLAGE INDUSTRIES BOARD 3 , E s t a b l i s h m e n t o f t h e Board.— ( 1 ) With e f f e c t from such d a t e a s t h e A d m i n i s t r a t o r may by n o t i f i c a t i o n i n t h e Delhi G a z e t t e f i x i n t h i s b e h a l f , t h e r e s h a l l be e s t a b l i s h m e n t f o r t h e p u r p o s e s of t h i s Act a Board t o be c a l l e d t h e D e l h i Khadi and V i l l a g e I n d u s t r i e s Board, I. The Board s h a l l b e a body c o r p o r a t e by t h e n-ams a f o r e s a i d , h a v i n g p e r p e t u a l s u c c e s s i o n and a common s e a l , with power t o a c q u i r e , h o l d and d i s p o s e o f p r o p e r t y and t o c o n t r a c t and. may, by t h e s a i d name s u e and t o be s u e d ! P r o v i d e d t h a t any l e a s e , s a l e o r t h e t r a n s f e r t c any p e r s o n o r a u t h o r i t y o t h e r t h a n t h e Commission of any immovable p r o p e r t y b e l o n g i n g t o t h e Board s h a l l be n u l l and v o i d u n l e s s i t i s s a n c t i o n e d by t h e A d m i n i s t r a t o r , 4, C o n s t i t u t i o n o f t h e Board,- ( l ) The Board s h a l l c o n s i s t o f not X*s* than t h y e # and a o t JSOTS i t e a a i a e n$0i$%m a p p o i n t e d by t h e A d x d n l s t r s t o r a f t & r c o n s u l t a t i o n w i t h t h e Oomssisslon f ^ m among - ( a ) n o n - o f f i c i a l s , who i n t h e opinion o f t h e A d m i n i s t r a t o r have shown a c t i v e i n t e r e s t i n t h e p r o d u c t i o n and development of Khadi and V i l l a g e i n d u s t r i e s ; and . ( b ) o f f i c i a l s , ( 2 ) The A d m i n i s t r a t o r s h a l l , a f t e r c o n s u l t a t i o n with t h e Commission nominate one o f t h e members of t h e Board t o be t h e Chairman t h e r e o f , ( 3 ) The Chairman s h a l l e x e r c i s e such powers and perform such d u t i e s a s may be p r e s c r i b e d * 5 , V i c e - c h a i r m a n . - The A d m i n i s t r a t o r may, a f t e r c o n s u l t a t i o n with t h e Commission, a p p o i n t from among t h e o t h e r members not being o f f i c i a l s , a Vice-chairman who s h a l l e x e r c i s e such of t h e powers and d i s c h a r g e such t o him by t h e GhS-iroan* -- 4 of 15 -- 5 - 6. S e c r e t a r y , - The Admiaistrator s h a l l apooint aft- r c -'••"- t a t i o n with t h e Commission, a member o t h e r than t h e Chairman r t h e Vice-chairman t o he t h e Secretary of t h e Board whb 'Shall exercise such powers and discharge srch duties as nay be proscribed or as may be delegated to him by t h e Chairman* 7 . Resignation of office by members:- Any member may resign h i s office by giving notice in writing t o t h e Administrator and on such resignation being notified i n t h e Delhi Gazette by th< A d a i n i s t m t o r s h a l l be dcemc-r1 to , ---- -vacated his o f f i c e . 8. Vacancies e t c . not t o i n v a l i d a t e acts and proceedings of t h e Board or any of i t s committees.:— No act or proceeding of t h e Board o r any- of i t s committees s h a l l he i n v a l i d by reason' only of t h e existence of any vacancy in i t s membership or by reason of any defect in the constitution thereof. 9. Temporary association of persons vdth the Board for p a r t i c u l a r p u r p o s e s ; - ( l ) The Board may associate with i t s e l f in such manner and for such purposes as may be rletormimKl by regulations made under t h i s a c t , any person whoso assistance o r advice i t may desire i n complying with any of t h e provisions of t h i s Act, ( 2 ) A person associated with the Board undi r stib-sccticn ( 1) for any purpose s h a l l have the r i g h t t o t a k e part in the discussions of t h e Board relevant to t h a t purpose, but s h a l l not have t h e r i g h t to vote and s h a l l not be a member for any other purpose. ( 3 ) The Administrator may, by o r d e r , depute one o r more o f f i c e r s serving i n connection vdth t h e administration of t h e TTnion t e r r i t o r y of Delhi t o attend any meeting .of t h e Board, and t o t a k e p a r t i n , any discussions of t h e Board, but such o f f i c e r o r offxefers • s h a l l not have the rxght t o vote J 10. Meetings of t h e Board:- ( 1 ) The Eo&rd s h a l l meet a t such times and places and s h a l l , subject t o t h e provisions of sub- s e c t i o n s ( 2 ) t o (/,.), observe such rules of procedure in regard t o t h e t r a n s a c t i o n of business a t i t s meeting, including t h e - quorum at meetings, as may be provided by regulations made by t h e Board vinder t h i s Act: • Provided t h a t the Board s h a l l meet a t l e a s t once in every tv-^o months* , ( 2 ) The Chairman may, whenever he thinks f i t , c a l l a special meeting of"the Board. (.3) The Chairman or i n . h i s absence, the Vice-Chairman o r , in the absence of both t h e Chairman and the Vice-Chairman, any member chosen by t h e members present from among themselves, s h a l l preside a t a meeting of the Board. (A) All Questions at a meeting o f the; Board s h a l l be decided by a majority of votes of the members present and voting end i n the case of an equality o f ' v o t e s , t h e Chairman, o r , in his absence, t h e person presiding s h a l l have a second or casting vote, -- 5 of 15 -- - 6 - (5) Minutes of t h e proceedings of each meeting of t h e Board s h a l l be drawn up and recorded in a r e g i s t e r to bo kept for t h a t purpose, f.nd s h a l l be l a i d before the next ensuing mteting of the Boar'1. and signed at such meeting by the presiding o f f i c e r thereof and copies of such minutes s h a l l be forwarded to the administrator and t h e tonmission within fifteen days from the date en which they arc signed as aforesaid, 11. Texas r.f t h e office and conditions of service-of t h e Chairman, Vice—chairman, Secretary and other members- t h e term of office and t e r n s and conditions of service of the Chairman, Vice-chairman, Secretary and other members s h a l l be such as may bo prescribed. 12. Standing Committees :- ( l ) There Shall be constituted from among t h e members in the prescribed manner a Standing Finance Committee, which s h a l l exercise such of the powers r e l a t i n g to the finances of t h e Beard as nay be specified by regulations made by the Board under t h i s Act, ( 2 ) The Board may constitute such other standing committees consisting of such number of members and in such manner as may be prescribed for exercising any power or discharging any duty of' the'Board, or for enquiring i n t o , o r reporting and advising on, any n a t t e r which t h e Board say r e f e r to then, ( 3 ) The Standing Finance CAnmittee or any other standing committee constituted under t h i s section s h a l l meet a t such times and p l a c e s and s h a l l observe such r u l e s of proceoiure in, regard to t h e transaction of business a t i t s meetings, including t h e quorum at meetings, as nay be provided by regulation made by t h e Board under t h i s Act, 13. Officers and servants of the Board ; - (1 ) The Administrator shall appoint a person not being a member, to be the Financial Advisor and Chief Accounts Officer who s h a l l exercise such powers and perform such duties as say be prescribed* ( 2 ) The Administrator s h a l l appoint a person, not being a member, to be the Executive Officer of t h e "Board and t h e Executive Officer s h a l l exercise such powers and perform such duties as may be proscribed o r as nay be delegated t o him by the Chairman, ( 3 ) S-ub.iect to such rules as may be n.ade by t h e Administrator i n t h i s behalf, t h e Board nay appoint such o t h e r o f f i c e r s and servants as i t considers necessary for the e f f i c i e n t perfornance o£ i t s functions ' P r o v i d e d t r~ '''•'•• ••••• Tfirifi t-rh< V i n w c s i ' l i i r i <">T" +"r r. be appointed by t h e Board except with t h e previous approval of t h e Administrator. o o n t d . « . . . . 7 . -- 6 of 15 -- •&£$& . . - 1 7 : - C H A P T E R I I I FUHGTIOHS AND P0W3BS OF THE BOARD 14. Functions of t h e Board : - ( 1 ) S u b j e c t t o t h e p r o v i s i o n s of t h i s A c t , t h e f u n c t i o n of t h e Board s h a l l sreneraUv bo t o nlsn, o r g a n i s p " T ' 1 irvcl ctr^nt programmes f o r t h e development o f Khadi and V i l l a g e I n d u s t r i e s , ( 2) I n p a r t i c u l a r and without p r e j u d i c e t o t h e g e n e r a l i t y of t h e f o r e g o i n g p r o v i s i o n , t h e Board may t a k e such s t e p s a s i t t h i n k s f i t - . . ( a ) t o promote, encourage and a s s i s t in t h e development of khadi arid v i l l a g e industries,and t o carry on t r a d e or business in t h e products of such i n d u s t r i e s j ( b ) to provide work t o persons who have been professionally engaged in khadi and v i l l a g e i n d u s t r i e s ; ( c ) t o grant loans to i n d i v i d u a l s , societies o r i n s t i t u t i o n s engaged, i n khadi and v i l l a g e i n d u s t r i e s on s uch-ke r n s - a s may be prescribed; ( d ) t o encourage establishment of co-operative s o c i e t i e s i n khadi and v i l l a g e i n d u s t r i e s ; ( e) to conduct t r a i n i n g centres with a view t o impart t h e necessary s k i l l and knowledge for carrying on khadi and v i l l a g e i n d u s t r i e s ; ( f ) t o manufacture tools and implements and tc arrange supply of such t o o l s and implements and raw materials in order t o secure development of khadi and v i l l a g e i n d u s t r i e s ; ( g ) t o conduct p u b l i c i t y and propaganda and organise marketing of finished products of khadi and v i l l a g e i n d u s t r i e s by opening s t o r e s , shops, emporia and exhibitions; ( h ) t o undertake and encourage research with a view t o improve t h e quality _and marketability of khadi and t h e products of v i l l a g e i n d u s t r i e s ; ( i ) t o c o l l e c t s t a t i s t i c s r e l a t i n g to khadi and v i l l a g e i n d u s t r i e s from such person o r persons a s may be prescribed and t o publish t h e s t a t i s t i c s so collected; be ( j ) t o carry out any o t h e r matter which may^ res crib ed. S a n c t i o n of pro grama e,— The A d m i n i s t r a t o r nay, a f t e r c o n s u l t a t i o n w i t h t h e Commission,, a p - r o v e and s a n c t i o n t h e programme r e f e r r e d t o i n s e c t i o n 16 i n whole o r w i t h such m o d i f i c a t i o n as he c o n s i d e r l f i t , 18, Supplementary programme - The Board may p r e p a r e and forward -a supplementary programme f o r t h e s a n c t i o n o f t h e A d m i n i s t r a t o r i n such form and b e f o r e such .date as t h e a d m i n i s t r a t o r may p r e s c r i b e and t h e p r o v i s i o n s o f s e e t i o n 17 s h a l l apply in. r e l a t i o n t o such Supplementary programme, 19, Power c f t h e Board t o a l t e r scheme - The Board raayu w i t h the p r e v i o u s approval of t h e Commission,? make a r y a l t e r a t i o n i n any scheme so l o n g as t h e a g g r e g a t e amount sanctioned f o r such scherae i s not exceeded find e r e p o r t of t h e a l t e r a t i o n s h a l l he s e n t t o t h e A d m i n i s t r a r o r i n 'such fora and w i t h i n such t i m e as mar b e . p r e s c r i b e d . - CBAPTBH y mMJLSm^ A0CCDi:TS? AUDIT AND HEP 20, Payments t o t h e Board :— The A d m i n i s t r a t o r may pay t o t h e Board, i n each f i n a n c i a l y e a r , s u c h sums by way of g r a n t s o r advances as he may c o n s i d e r n e c e s s a r y fbr t h e performance of t h e f u n c t i o n s o f t h e Board under S1» Borro wine -power o f t h e Board '- The Board may; f»r, time t o t i n e , with t h e p r e v i o u s -sanction of t n e A d m i n i s t r a t o r and subject, t o t h e p r o v i s i o n s of t h i s A ct and such c o n d i t i o n s as he may determine^ borrow any sum r e q u i r e d f o r t h e p u r p o s e s of t h i s Act; -- 8 of 15 -- "Provided t h a t the previous sanction of t h e Administrator s h a l l not be necessary to borrow any staa from the Commission. 22, Funds of the Board i (1 ) The Board s h a l l have two s e p a r a t e funds known as t h e khadi fund and t h e v i l l a g e i n d u s t r i e s fund and a l l t h e r e c e i p t s obtained by the Board from time to time by way of grants, donations, g i f t s , advances o r loans for the purpose of khadi o r v i l l a g e i n d u s t r i e s s h a l l be credited to the khadi fund o r , as the case may be, the village i n d u s t r i e s fund and a l l .payments by t h e Board for or in respect of khadi o r v i l l a g e i n d u s t r i e s s h a l l be made from t h e appropriate fund. ( 2 ; The Board may accept g r a n t s , donations and gifts from the Central Government o r the Government of State o r Union t e r r i t o r y o r any-local authority o r any body o r association whether incorporated or not o r any individual for a l l or any of t h e purposes of t h i s Act. ( 3 ) I f a t any time the amount available i n e i t h e r of t h e two funds referred to in sub-section ( 1 ) i s in excess of t h e requirements of t h a t fund and the amount available in the other fund i s insufficient to meet t h e requirements of the.t fund, t h e Board may, with t h e previous approval of t h e Administrator, t r a n s f e r from the f i r s t mentioned fund the excess amount o r such part thereof as may be necessary to t h e other fund. Explanation - 5br t h e purposes of computing t h e amount a%railable in e i t h e r of the two funds, the amounts accepted under sub-section ( 2 ) shall not be taken into account. (4.) All moneys belonging to t h e Board shall, be deposited with t h e State Bank of India or a subsidiary bank or where t h e r e i s no office of t h e S t e t e Bank of Indie, or subsidiary bark, in a Government treasury o r be invested in such s o c u r i t i o s as may bo approved by t h e Gentral Government. ( 5 ) The accounts of the Board s h a l l be operated upon by sucfi officers jointly or individually as may be authorised by the Board. 23.
